gravitixDocs.title: Gravitix Référence ya monoko
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Langue ya scripting ya performance ya likolo pona kotonga ba bots. 96 makambo oyo ezali na kati. Rouille ya sima ya sima.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix ezali monoko ya domaine spécifique (DSL) oyo esalemi kobanda na nse mpo na kokoma ba bots ya Vortex. Epayi wapi minoko misusu esengaka ba bibliothèques, ba callbacks, mpe boilerplate, Gravitix epesi yo ba handlers ya événement ya classe ya liboso, ba flux ya masolo, mpe état intégré — nionso wana na syntaxe ya peto, ya kotangama oyo e inspiré na Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Kotangama — code etangamaka lokola mokano, kasi masini te
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Safe — ba types statiques ezuaka ba erreurs avant temps d'exécution
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Expressive — ba flux, ba gardes, na matching ya modèle ezali intégré
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal — ba classes te, héritage te, ba cadres ya koyekola te
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix ezali mpo na moto nyonso oyo alingi kotonga bot ya Vortex noki — ezala okoma naino code te liboso, to ozali développeur ya expérience oyo alembi na boilerplate ya Python. Référence oyo eteyaka Gravitix à partir ya ba principes ya liboso : expérience préalable esengeli te.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Eteni mokomoko etongami likoló na oyo ya liboso. Soki ozali ya sika na programɛ, tángá banda likoló tii na nse. Soki oyebi deja monɔkɔ mosusu, salelá tableau de contenus mpo na kopumbwa mbala moko na makambo oyo esepelisi yo.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Nzela ya mbangu koleka kobanda na zéro kino na bot oyo ezali kotambola.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on /start { ... } — elimboli mosali oyo etambolaka tango mosaleli atindi /start. emit "..." — etindi nsango lisusu na mosaleli. {ctx.first_name} — ekɔtisaka nkombo ya liboso ya mosaleli na kati ya molongo.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Na IDE ya Gravitix, finá na bouton Run na barre ya likolo. Tyá Vortex Bot Token na yo ntango bakosɛnga yo. Bot ebandi mbala moko — etape ya kotonga esengeli te.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Programme nionso ya Gravitix etongami na ba blocs de construction misato ya base : ba handlers, ba déclarations ya émet, na logique.
gravitixDocs.anatomyOfHandler: Anatomie ya moto oyo azali kosimba yango
gravitixDocs.multipleEmits: Ba émets ebele = ba messages ebele
gravitixDocs.multipleHandlers: Ba handlers ebele pona déclencheur moko
gravitixDocs.explicitTypes: Ba annotations ya type ya polele
gravitixDocs.updatingVariables: Kosala mise à jour ya ba variables
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Valeur nionso na Gravitix ezalaka na type. Système ya type ezali statique : ba types e vérifier na temps ya compilation, avant bot na yo ekende.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Ba opérateurs basangisaka ba valeurs pona kobimisa ba valeurs ya sika.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Ba chaînes na Gravitix ezali texte encodé UTF-8. Ba soutenir interpolation riche na suite ya ba opérations intégrées.
gravitixDocs.stringOperations: Ba opérations ya molongo na nzela ya ba intégrés
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Pattern-match motuya moko na ba modèles ebele. Kanisa yango lokola maloba ya switch ya nguya.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Ba fonctions ezali ba blocs ya code oyo ekoki kosalelama lisusu. Basalisaka yo oboya kozongela makambo mpe kosala ete code ezala mpasi te mpo na kokanga ntina na yango.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Ba handlers bazali motema ya bot moko ya Gravitix. Mosali moko na moko ayokaka lolenge moko ya likambo ya sikisiki mpe atambolaka ntango likambo yango esalemi.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Ba gardes ba permettre yo obakisa condition na handler. Moto oyo azali kosimba yango azali kopota mbangu kaka soki mokɛngɛli azali kotalela solo.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Objet ctx ezali automatiquement disponible na kati ya handler nionso. Ezali na makambo oyo etali nsango oyo ezali lelo mpe mosaleli oyo atindaki yango.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: State e permettre bot na yo e rappeler makambu entre ba messages. Sans état, message nionso eza indépendant et bot eza na mémoire te.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Ba flux e permettre yo okoma masolo ya ba étapes ebele na style linéaire, oyo ekoki kotangama. Flux ekoki ko pause mpe kozela message oyo elandi ya usager.
gravitixDocs.validationInFlow: Validation na kati ya flux moko
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Kotinda ba messages ezali sortie ya liboso ya bot.
gravitixDocs.emitTo: emit_to — tinda na mosaleli moko ya sikisiki
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Tambwisa code automatiquement na programme — misala ya cron te, ba services ya libanda esengeli te.
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: na — kopota mbangu na ngonga moko ya sikisiki ya mokolo
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Opérateur ya pipe |> alekisaka valeur lokola argument ya liboso na fonction oyo elandi. Ezali kosala ete misala ya kokanga na minyɔlɔlɔ ezala likoki ya kotángama, na lobɔkɔ ya mwasi tii na lobɔkɔ ya mobali.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix epesaka traitement ya erreur structuré na ba blocs ya try / catch / finally.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Structs e permettre yo o grouper ba données oyo etali yango na se ya type oyo ezali na kombo. Enums e définir ensemble fermé ya ba variantes.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix etindi bibliothèque ya mathématiques ya mobimba na ~180 fonctions.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix ezali na type complexe natif — paire ya ba flotteurs ya 64 bits oyo ezali ko représenter ba parties ya solo mpe ya imaginaire.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix ezali na calcul numérique : ba dérivés na ba integrales calculés na ba fonctions arbitraires.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Algèbre linéaire ezali matematiki ya ba vecteurs na ba matrices.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Théorie ya nombre eyekolaka ba propriétés ya ba nombres entiers. Fondation ya cryptographie ya mikolo oyo.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Statistique epesaka bisaleli mpo na kolimbola, kotalela, mpe kozwa bosukisi na ba données.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Ba fonctions spéciales ezali ba solutions ya ba équations différentielles ya ntina.
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Transformation ya Fourier e décomposer signal moko na ba fréquences constituantes na yango.
gravitixDocs.listMethods: Liste ya ba méthodes (notation ya ba points) .
gravitixDocs.mapMethods: Méthodes ya carte (notation ya ba points) .

gravitixDocs.bp3: Salelá bakɛngɛli na esika ya soki-minyololo mpo na ndingisa
gravitixDocs.bp5: Salelá bozongi liboso mpo na kokitisa kosala zumbu

Mituya ya mindondo ebakisaka ligne ya solo na plan, epesaka nzela na ba solutions na ba équations lokola x2 + 1 = 0 oyo ezali na eyano ya solo te.
complex_type.p2: Na Gravitix okomi ba littérales imaginaires na suffixe i:
complex_type.p3: Ba opérations nionso minei ya base esalaka na ba valeurs complexes directement. Gravitix elandi mibeko ya arithmétique complexe standard:
complex_type.p4: Traitement ya signal (analyse audio, FFT), génération ya fractal (ensemble Mandelbrot), ba simulation ya physique, ba calculs ya impédance électrique, na calcul quantique nionso esengaka arithmétique complexe. Gravitix e permettre yo osala ba calculs oyo kaka na kati ya bot Vortex sans bibliothèques ya libanda.

error.h3: Kobwaka mabunga na ndenge ya polele
error.p1: Envelopper code nionso oyo ekoki ko échouer na bloc try. Soki libunga ezali thrown — ezala na Gravitix tango ya kosala to na ndenge ya polele na code na yo — exécution epumbwaka na bloc catch. Valeur oyo ekangami ekangami na variable oyo opesi kombo ya catch.
error.p2: finally etambolaka sans condition — soki try alongaki to catch asimbaki libunga. Salelá yango mpo na kobimisa biloko, kosala journal, to kotinda nsango ya kosilisa.
error.p3: Salelá botangi ya mabunga mpo na misala oyo etali bokotisi ya libanda : kososola makomi ya mosaleli, kobenga ba API, kotanga ba variables ya environnement, to kosala matematiki ya mindondo esika mabunga ya domaine (sqrt ya négatif, journal ya zéro) ekoki kosalema. Pona ba erreurs ya logique interne, préférer ba clauses guard na ba returns ya liboso.

intro.li1: Readable — code etangamaka lokola intention, kasi machinerie te
intro.li2: Safe — mitindo ya statique catch mabunga liboso ya tango ya kosala
intro.li3: Expressive — flows, guards, mpe motindo matching etongami na kati
intro.li4: Minimal — ba classes te, héritage te, ba cadres ya koyekola te
intro.p1: Gravitix ezali monoko ya domaine spécifique (DSL) oyo esalemi banda na nse mpo na kokoma ba bots Vortex. Epayi wapi minoko misusu esengaka ba bibliothèques, ba callbacks, mpe boilerplate, Gravitix epesi yo ba handlers ya événement ya classe ya liboso, ba flows ya masolo, mpe state oyo etongami na kati — nionso wana na syntaxe ya peto, oyo ekoki kotangama oyo epemamaki na Rust.
intro.p2: Gravitix ezali mpo na moto nyonso oyo alingi kotonga bot Vortex noki — ezala okoma naino te code liboso, to ozali développeur ya expérience oyo alembi Python boilerplate. Référence oyo eteyaka Gravitix uta na ba principes ya liboso : expérience ya liboso esengeli te.
intro.p3: Eteni mokomoko etongami likoló na oyo ya liboso. Soki ozali ya sika na programɛ, tángá banda likoló tii na nse. Soki oyebi deja monɔkɔ mosusu, salelá tableau de contenus mpo na kopumbwa mbala moko na makambo oyo esepelisi yo.
intro.p4: Na référence oyo mobimba, → elakisi "evaluer na" to "abimisaka", mpe // ... elakisi ba commentaires oyo compilateur azali ko ignorer.

math_special.cc6: Ai epɔlaka na ndenge ya exponentiel mpo na x→+∞, ebalukaka mpo na x→-∞

math_special.p1: Fonction Gamma Γ(n) ezali généralisation continue ya factorial : Γ(n) = (n−1)! mpo na mituya mobimba ya malamu. Ezali kopanzana na mituya factoriel kino na mituya ya solo mpe ya mindondo.
math_special.p2: Fonction ya erreur erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(−t2)dt ezali integral ya Gaussien. Ezali na boyokani directement na CDF normal mpe emonanaka na ba équations ya chaleur mpe na théorie ya probabilité.
math_special.p3: ζ(s) = Σ 1/nˢ mpo na n=1,2,3,... (ntango Re(s)>1). Ezali ko connecter na distribution prime na nzela ya produit ya Euler. Hypothèse ya Riemann (esili kosila te!) etali ba zéro ya ζ na plan complexe.
math_special.p4: Ba fonctions ya Bessel Jₙ(x) na Y3(x) ezali ba solutions ya équation différentielle ya Bessel : x2y'' + xy' + (x2−n2)y = 0. Emonanaka na propagation ya mbonge, conduction ya chaleur na ba cylindres, pe mécanique quantique.
math_special.p5: Ai(x) na Bi(x) ezali ba solutions na y'' = xy. Bazali komonana na tunnel quantique (pproximation WKB) mpe na optique (diffraction).
math_special.p6: Ba familles polynomiques oyo ebimaka lokola ba fonctionnements propres ya ba opérateurs importants mpe esalelamaka na ba méthodes spectrales, quadrature, na mécanique quantique.
math_special.p7: K(k) na E(k) ezali ba integrales elliptiques complets ya lolenge ya liboso na ya mibale. Ba calculer période ya pendule non linéaire na périmètre ya ellipse.
math_special.td1: Γ(x) = ∫₀^∞ tˣ⁻1e⁻dt. Kokanisa ya Lanczos. Γ(n+1)=n!
math_special.td2: ln|Γ(x)|. Avoids likolo yaflow mpo na x ya monene.
math_special.td3: ψ(x) = d/dx ln Γ(x) = Γ'(x)/Γ(x) Ezali ndenge moko na ba .
math_special.td5: P3(x): orthogonale na [−1,1]. Eteni ya angle ya ba fonctions ya mbonge ya hydrogène.
math_special.td6: H3(x): na nzela ya orthogonale w.r.t. e^(−x2) oyo ezali na kati. Oscillateur harmonique quantique.
math_special.td8: L3(x): orthogonale na [0,∞) w.r.t. e^(−x) mpe ezali. Ba fonctions ya mbonge radiale ya hydrogène.
